scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,user,order,delivery,client -c blue,green,yellow,red,magenta "npm run dev -w gateway" "npm run dev -w user-service" "npm run dev -w order-service" "npm run dev -w delivery-service" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n gateway,user,order,delivery -c blue,green,yellow,red "npm run dev -w gateway" "npm run dev -w user-service" "npm run dev -w order-service" "npm run dev -w delivery-service"
scripts.build: npm run build -w gateway && npm run build -w user-service && npm run build -w order-service && npm run build -w delivery-service && npm run build -w client
